claim.observation: Trusted full Prefetch drift summary maps allocated EWF Prefetch entries at NTFS offset 1411072 against CYLR same-name Prefetch files. FLS found 280 EWF Prefetch entries: 153 allocated and 127 deleted-marked. All 153 allocated entries extracted with icat and parsed with pyscca as Prefetch v30. Of the 153 allocated EWF entries, 144 had CYLR same-name files and 9 did not; among the 144 pairs, 100 were byte/semantic equal and 44 were byte/semantic different.
claim.interpretation: This is a filename-pair drift map for allocated EWF Prefetch items versus the CYLR Prefetch surface. It supports per-file snapshot discipline: many pairs align exactly, while 44 same-name pairs differ in parsed Prefetch semantics and have CYLR latest-run timestamps newer than EWF latest-run timestamps.
